reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio completa, con baños limpios, dispensers de agua caliente y fría, restaurant Full y estacionamiento.
El día que fuí no tenían gran variedad de comidas calientes

(Translated by Google)
Full-service gas station with clean restrooms, hot and cold water dispensers, a restaurant, and parking.
The day I went, they didn't have a wide variety of hot meals.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLNEl6SFZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar y habitaciones limpias, la atención de su personal es excelente, se nos rompió la camioneta y los chicos de ahí nos consiguieron mecánico enseguida, y nos dejaron quedarnos en la habitación hasta que llegó la grúa, unos genios

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place and clean rooms, the staff's attention is excellent. Our truck broke down and the guys there got us a mechanic right away, and they let us stay in the room until the tow truck arrived. They were geniuses.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bjVtTlN3EAE
